prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次约 4170→4389→6780→3485→3813，2023 年因试卷难度变化出现异常高位（6780），2024 年大幅回弹至 3485，2025 年小幅后移至 3813；近两年基准约 3500–3800 区间，2025 年基准约 3813 名；2021–2025 年理科/物理类计划数分别为 119、132、130、127、130 人，2026 年计划 130 人，与 2025 年持平，无扩招也无缩招，计划因素对竞争影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2021–2026 年稳定在第 33–34 名，近年排名未发生明显变化，学校层次对考生吸引力保持稳定；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，主要因实验室爆炸事件引发校园安全关注；抖音热度为较热（总排名第 23），短视频曝光量中等偏上；未见明显投档断档记录，声誉整体对报考热度有轻微抑制作用；土木工程 A+、机械工程 A-、环境科学与工程 A-、电气工程 A-、风景园林学 A-；工科实力突出，电气、机械、计算机等热门工科专业与该校优势学科高度匹配，对理科考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及 其自动化均为高热推荐专业，与重庆大学工科试验班大类招生方向高度吻合；云南省 2026 年高考总人数约 37.79 万，较 2025 年（约 28.57 万）增长约 32%，物理类考生估算约 22.9 万（较 2025 年 17.3 万大幅增加），竞争显著加剧；重庆大学位于重庆市，与云南省地理相邻，交通便利、文化相近，对云南考生有天然的地域偏好 优势；该校在云南招生占比约 2.2%–2.5%，属中等偏上水平，邻省效应有助于维持报考热度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 3813、2026 年招生计划持平、本省物理类考生大幅增加约 32% 以及工科专业持续高热等因素，竞争加剧是主导力量，预计最低录取位次小幅前移；预测最低位次约 3733 名，区间 3233–4233 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 3233–4233 名内，建议以二档工科试验班（未来信息/高端装备）为主力填报，一档卓越计划/电气/计算机类可冲刺，三档智慧能源/医工交叉类作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<3233） 可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 science (physics category) minimum rankings approximately 4170→4389→6780→3485→3813; in 2023, due to exam difficulty changes, an abnormal high ranking (6780) occurred; in 2024, a significant rebound to 3485; in 2025, a slight backward shift to 3813; recent two-year baseline approximately 3500–3800 range; 2025 baseline approximately 3813th place; 2021–2025 science/physics category enrollment plans were 119, 132, 130, 127, 130 respectively; 2026 plan is 130, unchanged from 2025, no expansion nor reduction, plan factor has neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking 2021–2026 stable at 33rd–34th; recent years ranking has not changed significantly; school level attractiveness to candidates remains stable; 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to laboratory explosion incident raising campus safety concerns; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (total ranking 23rd), short video exposure medium to high; no obvious enrollment cutoff gaps recorded; overall reputation has a slight inhibitory effect on application heat; Civil Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Landscape Architecture A-; strong engineering strength, electrical, mechanical, computer and other popular engineering majors highly match the school's advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are all high-heat recommended majors, highly consistent with Chongqing University's engineering experimental class enrollment direction; Yunnan Province 2026 total college entrance exam candidates approximately 377,900, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 285,700); estimated physics category candidates about 229,000 (significantly increased from 173,000 in 2025), competition notably intensified; Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, geographically adjacent to Yunnan Province, convenient transportation, similar culture, has natural regional preference advantage for Yunnan candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Yunnan is about 2.2%–2.5%, medium to high level, neighboring province effect helps maintain application heat.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining 2025 baseline ranking 3813, 2026 enrollment plan unchanged, local physics category candidates significantly increased by about 32%, and continuous high heat of engineering majors, competition intensification is the dominant force; expected minimum admission ranking to move slightly forward; predicted minimum ranking approximately 3733, range 3233–4233.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3233–4233, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Future Information/High-End Equipment), with Tier 1 Excellence Program/Electrical/Computer classes as reach options, and Tier 3 Smart Energy/Medical Engineering Intersection classes as safety choices; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3233), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 825→775→822→711→921. From 2021 to 2024, it fluctuated narrowly within the 711–825 range, but in 2025 it significantly shifted backward to 921, a drop of about 210 places compared to 2024, marking the lowest level in five years. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment for liberal arts/history category was 10, 10, 10, 8, and 8 students respectively. In 2026, the plan sharply increases to 14 students, an expansion of 75% compared to 2025, significantly alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; consistently ranked 33rd–34th on the Soft Science main list. Its hierarchical advantage is also attractive to liberal arts candidates. In 2026, the reputation is somewhat negative (laboratory safety incident), but it mainly affects the perception of science and engineering; liberal arts admissions majors are not directly impacted. Douyin popularity is relatively hot, with overall exposure moderate. Chongqing University is known for engineering, and its liberal arts disciplines have not reached A- or above ratings. However, the Humanities and Sciences Experimental Class (Law and Journalism) relies on the university's platform, and law is rated A (not under Chongqing University's name, but Law and Journalism is a popular direction).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity is recommended (somewhat hot), Chinese Language/Literature major is recommended (somewhat hot), and foreign language majors are generally wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of Yunnan Province Gaokao examinees is about 377,900, with history category examinees estimated at about 148,600 (an increase of about 32% from 112,400 in 2025). The increase in examinees intensifies competition. However, the 75% expansion in enrollment plan far exceeds the examinee growth rate, making the overall competition environment significantly looser. Chongqing is geographically adjacent to Yunnan with convenient transportation, exerting strong regional appeal to Yunnan liberal arts candidates. Although the university's liberal arts enrollment share in Yunnan is small, it is stable. Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 921, the 75% expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan, the approximately 32% increase in history category examinees, and the relatively high popularity of law/Chinese majors, the expansion effect far exceeds the examinee growth rate. The minimum admission ranking is expected to shift significantly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1365, with a range of 1160–1570.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Humanities and Sciences Experimental Class (Law and Journalism)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Boya Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1160–1570, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 foreign language majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 Law and Journalism/Chinese Language and Literature as reach options, and Tier 3 Japanese as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<1160), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors.
